action_set_definitions.name: get_performance_kpis
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current performance indicators (PRB utilization and 5th-percentile user throughput) for a specific sector at a site.

site_id.description: The unique identifier for the site (e.g., 'URBAN_CORE_SITE_A').

action_set_definitions.name: get_site_physical_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current total antenna weight installed on the tower and identifies the associated backhaul link ID.

action_set_definitions.name: get_link_capacity_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the provisioned capacity and current traffic load for a specific network link.

link_id.description: The unique identifier for the backhaul link.

action_set_definitions.name: get_budget_remaining
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the current available Capital Expenditure (CAPEX) budget.

action_set_definitions.name: get_available_upgrades
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all available hardware upgrades, spectrum additions, or software features that can be deployed, including their costs, weights, and estimated performance impacts.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_deployment
action_set_definitions.description: Applies a selected upgrade to a specific site and sector, updating the environment state.

upgrade_id.description: The ID of the upgrade from the available catalog.

state_description.topology_map: A mapping of link IDs to their connected node pairs and physical distances.
state_description.link_capacities: Current provisioned bandwidth for each link ID in Gbps.
state_description.traffic_demand_matrix: Current data transfer requirements between node pairs in Mbps.
state_description.node_status: Current CPU and switching backplane utilization for each router/switch node.
state_description.remaining_budget: Remaining Capital Expenditure (CAPEX) budget for network upgrades.
state_description.simulation_step: The current time step in the planning horizon.
